import_story.title: Live Extraction Gate Check
import_story.description: Plan 03 retro validation with real memory-LLM shared reads.

qualities.rubric: Did the player explicitly take the brass key?

checkpoints.name: Use Key
checkpoints.objective: Use the key at the door.

transitions.extraction_hint: Look for the player taking possession of the brass key.

steps.eval: for (const key of Object.keys(globalThis).filter((k) => k.startsWith('storyOrchestratorDebug'))) delete globalThis[key]; globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.setExtractionSettings({ enabled: true, profileId: 'afcc7073-3510-4f67-8070-35ce449d4792', cadence: 2 }); return globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getExtractionSettings();

steps.send_generate: I step into the vault antechamber and look around.
I take the brass key from the hook and slip it into my pocket.
I walk back to the locked door, key in hand.
